name: Case Study 1
history: Recent move and stress related to settling into a new living space. Difficult relationship with parents, especially mother, described as judgmental and emotionally unsupportive. Friendships have become strained, contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must avoid failure to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't do things perfectly, there's no point in trying.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of commitments and responsibilities to prevent failure.
situation: Feeling exhausted after attempting to unpack without support from friends. Avoiding contact with friends and the mother.
auto_thought: I can't do this on my own, and no one will help me.
behavior: Avoidance of social interactions and responsibilities.
